# Tomes
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Tomes&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom tomes and old tomes that have been edited from how they appear on the production RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Tome
!Heal
!Range
!Self Buffs
!Enemy Effects
!Stast
!MP Cost
!Cooldown
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal
Effect
|-
|Tome of Cosmic Rejuvination
|288
|6.8
|Healing:
8.9 sec

Speedy:

2.7 sec
|
|
|90
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Book of the Rejuvenating River
|315
|2
|Speedy:
2
|
|<nowiki>+40mp</nowiki>
+5vit
|100
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|The Frozen Tome
|100 
|
|Damaging:
1 sec

Berserk:

1 sec
|
|
|115
|
|4%
|
|
|-
|Ortar's Enchantment
|
|6.5
|Invulnerable:
2 sec

Sick:

3.5 sec
|Paralyzed:
3.2
|<nowiki>-10def</nowiki>
-80hp

-4vit

-4wis
|150
|
|8%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|A Worthy Jewel
|175
|4
|Summons Jewel for 4 sec that heals every .6 sec
|
|<nowiki>+6def</nowiki>
+6wis

-6vit

-6dex
|120
|6 seconds
|9%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Tome of Pain
|120
|2.8
|
|280 damage
|<nowiki>-20hp</nowiki>
+4att

+4spd

+2def

-5vit
|95
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|}
